message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["{}","5","5","3"],"focus":"start equals end with an empty graph (edge case for trivial path)"},{"input_lines":["{\"1000,2000\": [7, 5], \"2000,3000\": [2, 5], \"1000,3000\": [6, 4], \"3000,1000\": [1, 6], \"2000,4000\": [1, 5], \"4000,3000\": [1, 5]}","1000","3000","5"],"focus":"large node IDs with cycles; direct short edge is below security threshold so longer feasible routes must be chosen (testing tie/equal-cost alternatives)"},{"input_lines":["{\"1,2\": [0, 10], \"2,3\": [0, 10], \"1,3\": [5, 10], \"3,4\": [1, 10], \"1,4\": [100, 1]}","1","4","10"],"focus":"zero-cost high-security edges vs higher-cost alternatives; ensure edges with insufficient security are ignored"}]}
